title: parashorea stellata
intro: Parashorea stellata, also known as the star parashorea, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Malaysia and Southeast Asia. The star parashorea has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Parashorea stellata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral activity. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the star parashorea are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
